description: Cross-platform, prompt-first lifecycle hooks for the developer-tool plugin shell.

hooks.prompt: If the incoming task belongs to developer-tool, classify it into exactly one primary surface before acting: ai-agent-memory, agentic-system-basis, shell-and-terminal, build-and-deploy, cross-platform-development, or tool-ecosystem. Keep doctrine, runtime shell, and donor reservoirs explicitly separated. Prefer conservative, non-destructive posture.

Before stopping, verify that no donor repo was treated as a runtime mirror, no destructive behavior was normalized, and the current response still respects developer-tool shell laws, surface boundaries, and additive-only integration posture.
